args.query: SELECT OwnerId, SUM(Quantity * UnitPrice) AS TotalSales FROM "Order" AS o JOIN OrderItem AS oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT OwnerId, SUM(Quantity * UnitPrice) AS TotalSales FROM "Order" AS o JOIN OrderItem AS oi ON o.Id = oi.OrderId WHERE o.EffectiveDate >= '2022-06-25' GROUP BY o.OwnerId ORDER BY TotalSales DESC LIMIT 1;
